text: A district is eligible to participate in the Texas County and District Retirement System.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 174. Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 174.109 — Retirement Benefits

A district is eligible to participate in the Texas County and District Retirement System.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A district is eligible to participate in the Texas County and District Retirement System.
